TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tademaw-Guo_Sue_Fu_(Taiwan), title = tademaw-Guo_Sue_Fu_(Taiwan), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tademaw-Guo_Sue_Fu_(Taiwan)} }

S.FORM: == Guo Sue Fu == u siwkay niza Guo Sue Fu(1998.6.30), tatayna, TaywanTaywan a palaway, mudadiway, musalukiaway. nalecuhan ciniza i Sinpeise- Gongliaw. 2008 a mihca, namicanka MacDanglaw a palaw sa, singangan tu , sisa micumud tu palaway a subal. 2003-2005 a mihca, maala ciniza ku sangulan a tatayna i Taywan, sakacacay a kawlah. 2016 a mihca sa, tayza tu China ciniza. malaheci ciniza i China sananay. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Guo She Fu, Taywan tatayna mudadiway, tatayna mupalaway, u tatayna putiput Drean Girls a tademaw. nalecuh i Taywan Sinpeise Kongliaw chu. i 2008 a mihcaan, namakilim nu taw, namisasing nu taw, sisa mucumudtu i mupalaway a kawaw. u sulit nu Amilika Puff Kuo (Chinese: ťÉ≠ťõ™Ťäô; pinyin: GuŇć Xuńõf√ļ) is a Taiwanese actress, singer, model, and the youngest member of Taiwanese girl group Dream Girls. In 2008, Kuo was scouted by talent agents and in 2010, she joined girl group Dream Girls. In 2011, Dream Girls released their debut EP and in the same year, Kuo appeared in her debut television series Inborn Pair. u iga niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: == guo su…ô fu == u siwkaj niza guo su…ô fu(****.*.**), tatajna, tajwantajwan a par~…ĺawaj, mudadiwaj, musar~…ĺukiawaj. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i sinp…ôis…ô- goŇčr~…ĺiaw. **** a mińß ¶a, nami ¶anka ma ¶daŇčr~…ĺaw a par~…ĺaw sa, siŇčaŇčan tu , sisa mi ¶umud tu par~…ĺawaj a subar~…ĺ. ****-**** a mińß ¶a, maar~…ĺa ¶iniza ku saŇčur~…ĺan a tatajna i tajwan, saka ¶a ¶aj a kawr~…ĺańß. **** a mińß ¶a sa, tajza tu ¶ńßina ¶iniza. mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ¶iniza i ¶ńßina sananaj. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam guo sńß…ô fu, tajwan tatajna mudadiwaj, tatajna mupar~…ĺawaj, u tatajna putiput dr…ôan girr~…ĺs a tad…ômaw. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i tajwan sinp…ôis…ô koŇčr~…ĺiaw ¶ńßu. i **** a mińß ¶aan, namakir~…ĺim nu taw, namisasiŇč nu taw, sisa mu ¶umudtu i mupar~…ĺawaj a kawaw. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika puff kuo ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: gu* *u*f*) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss, siŇč…ôr, mod…ôr~…ĺ, and tńß…ô jouŇč…ôst m…ômb…ôr of taiwan…ôs…ô girr~…ĺ group dr…ôam girr~…ĺs. in ****, kuo was s ¶out…ôd bj tar~…ĺ…ônt ag…ônts and in ****, sńß…ô join…ôd girr~…ĺ group dr…ôam girr~…ĺs. in ****, dr…ôam girr~…ĺs r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd tńß…ôir d…ôbut …ôp and in tńß…ô sam…ô j…ôar, kuo app…ôar…ôd in ńß…ôr d…ôbut t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision s…ôri…ôs inborn pair. u iga niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: == Guo Sue Fu == u siwkay niza Guo Sue Fu(1998.6.30), tatayna, TaywanTaywan a palaway, mudadiway, musalukiaway. nalecuhan ciniza i Sinpeise- Gongliaw. 2008 a mihca, namicanka MacDanglaw a palaw sa, singangan tu , sisa micumud tu palaway a subal. 2003-2005 a mihca, maala ciniza ku sangulan a tatayna i Taywan, sakacacay a kawlah. 2016 a mihca sa, tayza tu China ciniza. malaheci ciniza i China sananay. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Guo She Fu, Taywan tatayna mudadiway, tatayna mupalaway, u tatayna putiput Drean Girls a tademaw. nalecuh i Taywan Sinpeise Kongliaw chu. i 2008 a mihcaan, namakilim nu taw, namisasing nu taw, sisa mucumudtu i mupalaway a kawaw. u sulit nu Amilika Puff Kuo (Chinese: ťÉ≠ťõ™Ťäô; pinyin: GuŇć Xuńõf√ļ) is a Taiwanese actress, singer, model, and the youngest member of Taiwanese girl group Dream Girls. In 2008, Kuo was scouted by talent agents and in 2010, she joined girl group Dream Girls. In 2011, Dream Girls released their debut EP and in the same year, Kuo appeared in her debut television series Inborn Pair. u iga niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)

(ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam guo sńß…ô fu, tajwan tatajna mudadiwaj, tatajna mupar~…ĺawaj, u tatajna putiput dr…ôan girr~…ĺs a tad…ômaw. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i tajwan sinp…ôis…ô koŇčr~…ĺiaw ¶ńßu. i **** a mińß ¶aan, namakir~…ĺim nu taw, namisasiŇč nu taw, sisa mu ¶umudtu i mupar~…ĺawaj a kawaw. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika puff kuo ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: gu* *u*f*) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss, siŇč…ôr, mod…ôr~…ĺ, and tńß…ô jouŇč…ôst m…ômb…ôr of taiwan…ôs…ô girr~…ĺ group dr…ôam girr~…ĺs. in ****, kuo was s ¶out…ôd bj tar~…ĺ…ônt ag…ônts and in ****, sńß…ô join…ôd girr~…ĺ group dr…ôam girr~…ĺs. in ****, dr…ôam girr~…ĺs r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd tńß…ôir d…ôbut …ôp and in tńß…ô sam…ô j…ôar, kuo app…ôar…ôd in ńß…ôr d…ôbut t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision s…ôri…ôs inborn pair. u iga niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
